creator: freebsd@ohreally.nl
text:
Hi,

Port flavors currently are pretty much invisible to users/sysadmins. I understand that maintaining slave ports was time consuming, but at least the slave ports were easily visible to users. This is made even worse by the fact that there is no documentation (at all) about flavors from a user/sysadmin point of view; the only documentation I can find is for port maintainers.

As I see it, there would be 2 easy ways to make port flavors more sysadmin friendly:

Add a flavor selection dialog before the port options dialog.
Or bring back the slave port directories, but with a Makefile that just builds the original port in the selected flavor.

On top of that, a section in the FreeBSD handbook explaining flavors would be a good idea.

Thanks for considering,
  Rob
